entries.title: Frank Bryce murder and Harry dream

content.fact: Harry wakes from a vision of Voldemort murdering Frank Bryce and writes to Sirius, while the Weasleys invite him to the World Cup.
content.injection: Harry wakes from a vision of Voldemort murdering Frank Bryce and writes to Sirius, while the Weasleys invite him to the World Cup. Enforce this as a high-priority Context gate for Goblet of Fire: Year 4; block contradictory later-book or earlier-state knowledge unless accepted story lore explicitly overrides it.
